subject: [PATCH v1 9/9] docs: fuse: add io-uring bufring and zero-copy documentation

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) module, specifically covering its usage of io-uring buffer rings and zero-copy techniques. The new documentation explains how to set up kernel-managed buffer rings, which reduce memory allocation requirements and eliminate overheads associated with user page pinning and translation. It also describes the high-level process of using these buffer rings in FUSE operations.
